brain.commentary: The portfolio is heavily weighted toward high‑beta tech names and a volatile crypto slice, pushing overall beta to ~1.3 and volatility to ~0.35× market. This leans aggressive, so we stay in a risk‑on stance but apply a modest global multiplier (1.1) to keep exposure in check. Fragile signals are identified on NVDA, TSLA, META, BTC/USD, ETH/USD, SOL/USD and LTC/USD – they exhibit high beta, high volatility and negative alpha, so we dial back their conviction. Stable long positions (AAPL, GOOGL, SPY, QQQ, DIA) get a modest boost.

counsellors.nvidia: **Risk posture:** The portfolio is tech‑heavy, with several high‑beta names (NVDA, TSLA, META) and a sizable crypto slice that adds outsized volatility (vol > 0.5, negative beta).
